question:
What will be the output of the following code snippet?

```python
for i in range(5):
    if i == 3:
        continue
    print(i)
```

My answer is: B. 0 1 2 4. I think this is right because the "continue" statement will make it skip printing the number 3, so it will print all the numbers except 3.
